component.name: Tari Universe
component.summary: Mine Tari (XTM) with your CPU and GPU

description.p: Tari Universe is a desktop mining application for the Tari network. It provides a one-click interface for mining Tari (XTM) using your computer's CPU (via RandomX) and/or GPU, runs a Tari base node and wallet, and tracks your earnings.
Mining and node sidecars are downloaded on first run and stored in the application's sandboxed data directory.
